name: Street Food World Tour
tagline: Your taste buds have opinions. Let's rank them.

items.text: Birria tacos with consommé for dipping, double tortilla
A crackly banh mi stacked with pate, pickled carrot, and cilantro
A smash burger with lacy edges and american cheese
Wok-charred pad thai from a cart with a line around the block
A late-night doner wrap with garlic sauce and too much chili
A split arepa stuffed with shredded beef and black beans
Takoyaki fresh off the griddle, bonito flakes still waving
Drum-smoked jerk chicken with rice and peas
Falafel pita with amba, pickles, and a hard-boiled egg
Elote rolled in cotija with chile-lime crema
A steamer basket of soup dumplings you will definitely burn yourself on
Poutine with squeaky curds and gravy that means it
A chaat that hits sweet, sour, crunchy, and cold in one bite
Nashville hot chicken on white bread with pickles, regret optional
A gyro carved off the spit with tzatziki and raw onion
Churros dusted in cinnamon sugar with thick chocolate for dipping
